director.name: Colectivo Los Ingrávidos Colectivo Los Ingrávidos

introduction: Europeans were fascinated by gold as a condensed symbol of capital, rising money from a future-trafficked wealth. Massacres will be collateral damages, necessary for the conversion of lost souls, if it was possible to prove theologically that the “Indian” had a soul. People under torture declared that they had gold in large quantities, large enough to finance the construction of the General Archive of the Indies in Seville that now protects, like every cultural institution, documents of barbarism.
